test.name: TC-001 Login Admin Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser And Go To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name:txt_role' by value admin.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยสิทธิ์ผู้ดูแลระบบ

test.name: TC-002 Login Student Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser And Go To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name:txt_role' by value student.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'student/student_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'student/student_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยสิทธิ์นักศึกษา
test.status: Location should have contained 'student/student_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.

test.name: TC-003 Login Personnel In Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser And Go To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name:txt_role' by value in_personnel.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'in_personnel/in_personnel_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'in_personnel/in_personnel_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยสิทธิ์บุคลากรภายใน
test.status: Location should have contained 'in_personnel/in_personnel_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.

test.name: TC-004 Login Personnel Out Successfully

kw.name: Open Browser And Go To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name:txt_role' by value out_personnel.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Location Should Contain
kw.msg: Location should have contained 'out_personnel/out_personnel_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL contains ``expected``.
kw.status: Location should have contained 'out_personnel/out_personnel_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: เข้าสู่ระบบด้วยสิทธิ์บุคลากรภายนอก
test.status: Location should have contained 'out_personnel/out_personnel_home.php' but it was 'http://localhost/Fitness-swimming-master-main/index.php'.

test.name: TC-005 Login With Wrong Password

kw.name: Open Browser And Go To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'name:txt_role' by value admin.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.arg: Wrong email or password or role
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: กรอก Password ผิด ระบบต้องแสดง "Wrong email or password or role"

test.name: TC-006 Login Without Selecting Role

kw.name: Open Browser And Go To Login Page
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Password
kw.msg: Temporally setting log level to: NONE
kw.doc: Types the given password into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains
kw.msg: Text 'Please select role' did not appear in 10 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Text 'Please select role' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: ไม่เลือกระดับสมาชิก ระบบต้องแสดง "Please select role"
test.status: Text 'Please select role' did not appear in 10 seconds.

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
